title: mixed-chaos
description: Realistic hostile environment. All seven failure types fire concurrently at production-plausible rates (~29% total failure probability per call), plus 5% poisoned topics. This is the closest-to-production stress test. Hypothesis is conservative — half complete is a win at this failure density — but state integrity must remain 100%.

steady_state_hypothesis.title: Under realistic hostile failure rates: at least 40% complete, state always intact, zero crashes
